segments.text: And it came to pass in the twelfth year, in the twelfth month, in the first day of the month, that the word of the LORD came unto me, saying,

Son of man, take up a lamentation for Pharaoh king of Egypt, and say unto him, Thou art like a young lion of the nations, and thou art as a whale in the seas: and thou camest forth with thy rivers, and troubledst the waters with thy feet, and fouledst their rivers.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will therefore spread out my net over thee with a company of many people; and they shall bring thee up in my net.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Then will I leave thee upon the land, I will cast thee forth upon the open field, and will cause all the fowls of the heaven to remain upon thee, and I will fill the beasts of the whole earth with thee.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: And I will lay thy flesh upon the mountains, and fill the valleys with thy height.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: I will also water with thy blood the land wherein thou swimmest, even to the mountains; and the rivers shall be full of thee.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

footnotes: the land wherein…: or, the land of thy swimming

segments.text: And when I shall put thee out, I will cover the heaven, and make the stars thereof dark; I will cover the sun with a cloud, and the moon shall not give her light.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: All the bright lights of heaven will I make dark over thee, and set darkness upon thy land,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

footnotes: bright…: Heb. lights of the light in heaven

segments.text: I will also vex the hearts of many people, when I shall bring thy destruction among the nations, into the countries which thou hast not known.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

footnotes: vex: Heb. provoke to anger, or, grief

segments.text: Yea, I will make many people amazed at thee, and their kings shall be horribly afraid for thee, when I shall brandish my sword before them; and they shall tremble at every moment, every man for his own life, in the day of thy fall.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: The sword of the king of Babylon shall come upon thee.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: By the swords of the mighty will I cause thy multitude to fall, the terrible of the nations, all of them: and they shall spoil the pomp of Egypt, and all the multitude thereof shall be destroyed.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: I will destroy also all the beasts thereof from beside the great waters; neither shall the foot of man trouble them any more, nor the hoofs of beasts trouble them.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Then will I make their waters deep, and cause their rivers to run like oil,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: When I shall make the land of Egypt desolate, and the country shall be destitute of that whereof it was full, when I shall smite all them that dwell therein, then shall they know that I am the LORD.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

footnotes: destitute…: Heb. desolate from the fulness thereof

segments.text: This is the lamentation wherewith they shall lament her: the daughters of the nations shall lament her: they shall lament for her, even for Egypt, and for all her multitude,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: It came to pass also in the twelfth year, in the fifteenth day of the month, that the word of the LORD came unto me, saying,
Son of man, wail for the multitude of Egypt, and cast them down, even her, and the daughters of the famous nations, unto the nether parts of the earth, with them that go down into the pit.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Pharaoh shall see them, and shall be comforted over all his multitude, even Pharaoh and all his army slain by the sword,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: For I have caused my terror in the land of the living: and he shall be laid in the midst of the uncircumcised with them that are slain with the sword, even Pharaoh and all his multitude,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD
